case_title: BUDGET RENT A CAR SYSTEMS, INC. vs. THEPKAYSONE, SAYSANA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUDGET RENT A CAR SYSTEMS, INC. SERVED AUG-02-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THEPKAYSONE, SAYSANA

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUDGET RENT A CAR SYSTEMS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THEPKAYSONE, SAYSANA $16,913.58 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,913.58, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
